title: Agartha Golem
description: Agartha golems are now in Minecraft!
body:
**Ever wanted to have Agartha golems in Minecraft? Then this resource pack is for you! This resource pack changes the texture of golems — every golem will look like this.**

![Golem](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9817637329c0c4bfa30983c31a0b675170a75892.png)

_Supports Fresh Animations_
